name: Asahi  Saiba
description: Asahi Saiba is a former underground chef who instigated the recent invasion against Erina Nakiri's administration. ~! He was a disciple of Jōichirō Yukihira and the illegitimate son of Azami Nakiri. When this was discovered, he was welcomed into the Nakiri family by his younger half-sister Erina, officially becoming Asahi Nakiri.!~

In reality, he is the serial killer behind the Los Angeles Serial Killings. Beyond Birthday has never appeared in the manga, anime, or film series to date, but the BB Case was briefly alluded to in both manga and anime. name: Bubbles
description: Bubbles is the monkey pet of the North kai, better known as King Kai. He serves a special purpose during King Kai's training lessons, particularly one of two endurance tests, where trainees are instructed to chase after Bubbles in an effort to catch him. This forces the trainee to push themselves in gravitation 10 times that of the Earth. name: Buckingham
description: The ally and eventual lover of Richard. Considered Richard's Kingmaker.

name: Chiyo
description: Chiyo is the grandmother of Sasori and sister to Ebizo. She was once a powerful shinobi for the Hidden Village of Sand, but has since retired. She was a founder of the Sand Village’s puppet division, training many disciples and developing new puppets. Chiyo was also the one responsible for sealing the One-Tailed Shukaku inside Gaara under the orders of the Fourth Kazekage. As well as being a puppet master, Chiyo was also a talented poison maker. description: __Height:__ 170 cm __Class:__ 3rd year __Council Position:__ Secretary Chizuru has a tall and model-like figure and is a mature woman who seems to spend most of her time being quite serious. name: Emiri Uchi
description: Emiri Uchi, better known in the English translation by her nickname "Ucchi," is Tomoko's second then third-year classmate. Because she could not form a group of five with her friends for the school trip to Kyōto, she along with Yoshida and Yuri are put in Tomoko's group. Since that time and despite her initial dislike of Tomoko, she has become progressively interested in to obsessed with Tomoko to the point of developing a crush while still declaring that she finds her behavior "disgusting".

name: Galand
description: Galand is a demon who is a member of the Ten Commandments, a group of elite warriors of the Demon Clan handpicked by the Demon King himself. He was sealed away along with the rest of the clan in the Coffin of Eternal Darkness until he was set free by Hendrickson.

name: Gyouza Otoko
description: He is The Gyoza Fairy, currently residing in this restaurant called "Hungry Bug". His body is made of raw gyoza, he is as large as a beer can, but he is invisible to humans. His job is to make gyoza taste delicious. He does things like cooling the beer with pure willpower or putting in some chili oil for those who forgot to. However! He has no mercy for wretches who make light of gyoza!
